subject: english
topic_title: Words Associated with Health and Medicine
learning_objectives: Identify and use vocabulary related to the hospital and medical practice

sections.heading: Vocabulary Development: Health and Medicine
sections.content: 1. Ward: A separate room in a hospital. 2. Out-patient: A patient who receives treatment without being admitted. 3. Diagnosis: The identification of the nature of an illness. 4. Prognosis: The likely course of a disease. 5. Theatre: A room where surgical operations are performed. 6. Surgeon: A medical practitioner qualified to practice surgery. 7. Clinic: An establishment where patients are admitted for special study or treatment.

sections.heading: Medical Equipment and Terms
sections.content: 1. Stethoscope: An instrument for listening to someone's heart or breathing. 2. Scalpel: A small sharp knife used by a surgeon. 3. Incision: A surgical cut made in skin or flesh. 4. Prescription: An instruction written by a medical practitioner that authorizes a patient to be provided with medicine.
